agent_guidance: When an agent needs to know 'what does the pipeline do?', read the code first (scripts/enrich_supplements_v3.py, build_final_db.py). Then inspect a recent detail_blob from /tmp/pharmaguide_release_build/detail_blobs/. Run the audit scripts (audit_contract_sync.py, audit_raw_to_final.py) for an objective state snapshot. Only consult FINAL_EXPORT_SCHEMA_V1.md / SCORING_ENGINE_SPEC.md / DATABASE_SCHEMA.md AFTER verifying their claims against A-C above. Do not use docs/superpowers/* or docs/plans/* as implementation truth — those are historical design conversations, not specifications.
